name: Neo Twin Auto-Reply Orchestrator

database.notes: Polls neo-brain every 30s, writes drafts to legacy DB

critical_rules: Default state for new targets = disabled (must explicitly enable per target)
shadow_mode=true by default — 3-day soak before going live
Rate limit: 3 replies per target per hour (twin_active_state.max_per_hour)
Self-loop guard: skips messages from OWNER_PHONE or is_from_owner=true
Tier 1 confidence gate: abstain skips Tier 2 entirely
